app.name: JobLiberty
app.tagline: Samu aikin da ya dace tare da AI-powered amincewa.
app.mission: Taimaka wa masu neman aikin Afirka su buɗe damar aiki ta hanyar AI.
app.vision: Yin jagora na aikin hankali a ga kowa.

auth.verifyEmailDesc: Mun aika muku da hanyar tabbatarwa zuwa imel ɗinku. Don Allah duba akwatin saƙonku.
auth.resetInstructions: Shigar da imel ɗinka kuma za mu aika muku umarnin sake saita kalmar sirri.

landing.heroSubtitle: Ƙarfafa masu neman aikin Najeriya da Afirka tare da binciken resume na AI, daidaita aiki, da jagorar aiki na musamman.

features.title: Duk abin da kuke buƙata don samun matsayin mafarki

resumeAnalysis.desc: Samu bayani nan take game da ƙwarewa, gogewa, da dacewar ATS.

jobMatching.title: Daidaita Aikin Mai Hankali
jobMatching.desc: Gano ayyukan da suka dace sosai tare da gogewa da burin ku.

opportunityMode.title: Yanayin Damar
opportunityMode.desc: Duba yadda ƙananan gyare-gyare za su iya ƙara yawan dacewar ku.

step1.title: Ɗauki resume ɗinka
step1.desc: Ɗauki CV ɗinka a cikin tsarin PDF. AI ɗinmu zai bincike shi a cikin daƙiƙa.

step2.title: Samu cikakken bincike
step2.desc: Samu cikakkun bayanan ATS, rarrabuwar ƙwarewa, da shawarwari.

step3.title: Gano damar da suka dace
step3.desc: Bincika ayyukan da aka tsara tare da adadin dacewa da bayanan ƙwarewa.

step4.title: Ɗauki mataki & girma
step4.desc: Biya tsare-tsaren koyo na musamman, shirya don hirarraki, da bin diddigin ci gaba.

testimonials.title: An ƙaunace shi da masu neman aikin a duk faɗin Afirka

t1.quote: JobLiberty ya taimaka mini gano rago a resume na da ban sani ba. Na samu aikin farko a kamfanin fintech a cikin makonni 6.
t1.name: Aisha Bello

t2.quote: A matsayina na memba na NYSC, wannan kayan aikin ya ba ni ƙarfin zuciya da bayanan da na buƙata don neman ayyuka. Na samu hirarraki 3 a cikin mako ɗaya.
t2.name: Chinedu Okoro

t3.quote: Yanayin Damar yana da hikima. Ya nuna mini ainihin ƙwarewar da zan ƙara don daga 63% zuwa 91% dacewa.
t3.name: Fatima Ibrahim

faq.title: Tambayoyin da aka fi yawan yi
faq.a1: Ee, fasaloli na asali ciki har da binciken resume da daidaita aiki na asali kyauta ne. Fasaloli na musamman za su kasance ba da jimawa ba.
faq.q2: Wadanne harsuna ne aka goyi baya?
faq.a2: Mun goyi bayan Ingilishi, Hausa, Yoruba, da Igbo cikakke. Za ku iya canza harshe a kowane lokaci a cikin saituna ko navbar.
faq.q3: Bayanan resume na sirri ne da amintacce?
faq.a3: Hakika. Ana binciken resume ɗinku a gida kuma ba a adana shi ba tare da izinin ku ba. Duk bayanai an ɓoye su kuma za ku iya share su a kowane lokaci.
faq.a4: An horar da samfuran AI ɗinmu akan bayanan kasuwar Najeriya da Afirka. Daidaito ya dogara da ƙwarewa, gogewa, da mahimmancin wuri. Matsakaicin gamsuwar mai amfani ya wuce 87%.

cta.title: Shirya don buɗe damar aikinku?
cta.subtitle: Haɗu da dubunnan masu neman aikin Afirka suna amfani da AI don samun ayyuka mafi kyau cikin sauri.

upload.title: Ɗauki Resume ɗinka

hero.title: Kofarku zuwa ga damar aiki a Afrika
hero.description: Bincika damar da aka tsara wa masu basira na Najeriya da Afirka. Daga ayyukan gida zuwa karatuttukan duniya, farkon saukinku ya fara nan.

categories.title: Rukunonin Damar
categories.jobsDesc: Ayyukan cikakken lokaci, ɓangaranci, da kwangila a faɗin Afrika.
categories.scholarshipsDesc: Kuɗin tallafi don ilimi na gida da na duniya.
categories.fellowshipsDesc: Shirye-shirye masu saurin ci gaban aiki tare da jagoranci.
categories.internshipsDesc: Gogewa ta hannu da sasantar NYSC.
categories.competitionsDesc: Nuna ƙwarewar ku kuma ku ci kyaututtuka.
categories.hackathonsDesc: Gina, haɗin kai, da sabuntawa tare da masu gina.
categories.learningDesc: Darussa kyauta da na biya don haɓaka ƙwarewa.
categories.networkingDesc: Haɗu da ƙwararru da masu jagoranci.
categories.volunteerDesc: Ba da amfani yayin gina gogewar ku.
categories.opensourceDesc: Bayar da gudummuwa ga shirye-shirye masu gina gobe.

madeForNigerians.title: 🇳🇬 An yi don 'yan Najeriya
madeForNigerians.subtitle: Gano damar da aka kirkira musamman don 'yan Najeriya don koyo, girma, gina sana'o'i, da kuma haduwa da tsarin fasaha.

madeForNigerians.aiRecSubtitle: Bisa ga ci gaba na resume ɗinka, Liberty AI yana ba da shawarar waɗannan damar.
madeForNigerians.emptyState: Babu damar Najeriya da ake samu a yanzu.

nysc.title: 🇳🇬 Damar NYSC
nysc.description: Ayyukan horon aiki, sanya wa aiki, ayyukan CDS, da kuma damar kammala karatu ga mambobin kungiyar dake hidima.

siwes.title: 🎓 Horon SIWES & Masana'antu
siwes.description: Sanya horon masana'antu ga daliban digiri na farko a duk fadin Najeriya.

graduate.title: 💼 Shirye-shiryen Koyon Graduate
graduate.description: Shirye-shiryen kammala karatun digiri na farko daga bankunan Najeriya, kamfanonin sadarwa, kamfanonin fintech, kamfanonin tattaunawa, farawa, da kamfanoni masu zaman kansu na duniya.

startups.title: 🚀 Ayyukan Farawa
startups.description: Gano damar aiki daga kamfanonin farawa na Najeriya masu saurin girma.

remote.title: 🌍 Ayyukan Nesa don Afirka
remote.description: Damar ayyukan nesa musamman ga masu neman aiki daga Najeriya da Afirka.

fellowships.title: 🤖 AI & Fellowships na Fasaha
fellowships.description: Shirye-shiryen fellowship da aka tsara don gina fasahar basirar wucin gadi da fasaha masu matukar bukata.

certifications.title: 📚 Takaddun Shaida na Kyauta
certifications.description: Sami takaddun shaida masu mahimmanci da masana'antu suka yarda da su daga manyan kamfanonin fasaha na duniya kyauta.

competitions.title: 🏆 Gasar
competitions.description: Kalubalanci kanka, baje kolin basirarka a matakin duniya, kuma ka ci kyaututtuka masu ban makaki.

opensource.title: 💻 Shirye-shiryen Buɗe Tushen
opensource.description: Ba da gudummawa ga software na buɗe tushen, yi aiki tare da masu haɓakawa a duniya, kuma a biya ku.

entrepreneurship.title: 🌱 Kasuwanci
entrepreneurship.description: Kaddamar da farawarka, sami kudade, shiga cikin accelerators, kuma ka gina babban abu na gaba.

meetups.title: Meetups
meetups.description: Haɗuwar al'ummomin gida don haɗawa, raba ilimi, da haɗin gwiwa.

hackathons.title: Hackathons
hackathons.description: Kalubalen lamba mai tsanani don warware matsalolin zamantakewa da tattalin arziki na gida da na duniya.

bootcamps.description: Shirye-shiryen horarwa na ɗan gajeren lokaci a fadin fasahohi daban-daban.
bootcamps.location: Kan Layi / Wasu Cibiyoyi na Musamman

conferences.title: Taron Fasaha
conferences.description: Taron shekara-shekara na masu gina fasaha, shugabanni, masu zuba jari, da masu hangen nesa.

communities.title: Al'ummomin Masu Haɓakawa
communities.description: Kungiyoyin fasaha masu aiki kamar GDG, Women Techmakers, da OSCA.

networking.title: Abubuwan Haɗin Kai
networking.description: Hanyoyin da aka tsara don nemo abokan gudanarwa da masu ba da shawara.

fairs.title: Baje Kolin Aiki
fairs.description: Ranakun ɗaukar ma'aikata tare da masu ɗaukar ma'aikata na gida da na duniya.

rec1.title: Abokin Injiniyan Software

rec2.description: Gudanar da bincike akan samfuran NLP na gida don harsunan Afirka a ƙarƙashin tsarin 3MTT.

rec3.title: Frontend Engineering Intern (NYSC)
rec3.description: Yi aiki akan mu'amalar masu amfani don 'yan kasuwa na Paystack a duk fadin Afirka ta Yamma yayin shekarar hidimarku.
